title: Readiness Report Schema
description: Schema for the machine-readable final readiness report emitted at the deterministic final gate. This shape is derived from canonical-architecture.md Sections 5.8, 9.1, 10.5, 19, and 20 plus IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md reports.py requirements. Open question: this schema includes `run_state` directly on the readiness report for v1 normalization, but a later implementation may choose to move it into a separate supervisor run-summary object.

run_id.description: Run identifier from canonical-architecture.md Section 20 "Machine-readable report".

claim_id.description: Queue claim identifier required by RULES.md reporting rules. Non-queue runs may emit null.

run_trace_id.description: Trace identifier used to correlate reports, logs, and artifacts, from RULES.md trace-correlation rules.

run_state.description: Supervisor-level run_state from canonical-architecture.md Section 9.1 "Terminal States and Readiness Verdict".

readiness_verdict.description: Final-gate readiness_verdict from canonical-architecture.md Section 9.1 "Terminal States and Readiness Verdict".

commands_run.description: Machine-readable command execution summaries. IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 1 reports.py and verifier guidance name command name, exit code, stdout, stderr, duration, and failure fingerprint as captured execution fields.

name.description: Executed contract or verification command name, from IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 1.

exit_code.description: Process exit code, from IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 1 verifier capture guidance.

stdout.description: Captured stdout, from IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 1 verifier capture guidance.

stderr.description: Captured stderr, from IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 1 verifier capture guidance.

duration_seconds.description: Execution duration, from IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 1 verifier capture guidance.

failure_fingerprint.description: Optional linked failure fingerprint, from IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 1 verifier capture guidance.

failures.description: Failures encountered during the run, as required by canonical-architecture.md Section 20. Open question: the docs do not yet settle whether these entries should be strings, defect packet refs, or embedded fingerprint objects.

changed_files.description: Changed file paths from canonical-architecture.md Section 20.

checkpoint_refs.description: Optional checkpoint references from canonical-architecture.md Section 20. RULES.md marks this field optional in the smallest v1.

artifact_manifest.description: Artifact manifest entries from canonical-architecture.md Section 20. Open question: the docs name artifact_manifest but do not yet define a structured manifest entry object, so v1 stores a normalized list of artifact paths.

unresolved_blockers.description: Unresolved blockers present at final gate, from canonical-architecture.md Section 20 and PROMPTS.md final readiness audit constraints.

queue_entry_reason.description: Why the run entered the queue or supervisor intake path, from RULES.md reporting rules.

queue_exit_reason.description: Why the run exited the queue or terminalized, from RULES.md reporting rules.

unresolved_blockers: Unresolved high-severity UI finding remains at final gate.
